---
title: "Which behavioural drivers explain changes in contacts and mobility, and do they improve transmission forecasts beyond observed behaviour?"
author: "Luke Burton"
format: docx
editor: visual
date: 2026-06-14
---

# Introduction

## Need

## Gap

## Aims

# Methods

## Data Sources

## Analysis workflow

## Model specification

## Evaluation

## Core outcomes / targets / results

## Supplementary work

## Extensions to consider

# References
